title: Tomorrowland Translation Model Bundle Manifest
description: Describes a self-contained, offline-loadable bundle of translation model files for one provider, including language-pair coverage, file inventory with checksums, and provider metadata.

bundle_version.description: Semantic version of the bundle manifest format (e.g. '1.0').

tomorrowland_release.description: Tomorrowland release version this bundle was built for (e.g. '0.7.0').

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the bundle was built.

name.description: Provider identifier matching a TranslationProvider impl (e.g. 'argos', 'opus_mt', 'ctranslate2', 'nllb').

version.description: Provider version string (e.g. 'libretranslate-1.6.3'), or null when unknown.

supported_languages.description: ISO 639-1 codes of all languages covered by this bundle.

language_pairs.description: Source→target language pairs this bundle can translate.

models_dir.description: Relative path within the bundle to the directory containing model files.

expected_env.description: Environment variables recommended for this provider at runtime. Bundled deployments can validate these are set before loading.

files.description: Inventory of every model file in the bundle with its SHA-256 checksum.

path.description: Relative path to the model file inside the bundle (e.g. 'models/en-ar.argosmodel').

sha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 digest of the file contents.

license.description: License and attribution for the bundled models.

source_url.description: URL to the license text or model source.

attribution.description: Attribution text required by the license.

verification_status.description: Whether an operator must verify the license before deployment.
